```{r}
# Draw the plot
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Grn)
```
```{r}
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  geneSymbol = "Lgals3",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
# Consider looking at Pf4, Spi1, Thbs1
# Draw the plot
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Lgals3)
```

```{r}
# For Top 10 DGE for the Hybrid-M Cluster
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Apoc2",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
# Consider looking at Apoc2, Lyz2, Mpeg1, Wldc17, Trobp, C1qa, C1qb, C1qc
# Draw the plot
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Apoc2)
#Macropage and Hybrid-M look very similar. Hybrid T and the Tumors look similar for Apoc2.
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Lyz2",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
# Consider looking at Apoc2, Lyz2, Mpeg1, Wldc17, Trobp, C1qa, C1qb, C1qc
# Draw the plot
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Lyz2)
#Macropage and Hybrid-M look very similar. Hybrid T and the Tumors look similar for Lyz2.
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Mpeg1",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
# Consider looking at Apoc2, Lyz2, Mpeg1, Wldc17, Trobp, C1qa, C1qb, C1qc
# Draw the plot
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Mpeg1)
#Macropage and Hybrid-M look very similar. Hybrid T and the Tumors look similar for Mpeg1 - actually striking for tumor/hybrids-m
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "C1qa",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
# Consider looking at Apoc2, Lyz2, Mpeg1, Wldc17(doesn't work), Trobp(doesn't work), C1qa, C1qb, C1qc
# Draw the plot
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$C1qa)
#Macropage and Hybrid-M look very similar. 
```
```{r}
#Top 10 DGE for Hybrid-T: Gsk3a, Hacd3, Ralgapb, Spire1, Tmem128, Eif2ak4, Prim2, Ythdf2, Cnot9
#Unpersausive: Gsk3a, Hacd3, 
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Ralgapb",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Ralgapb)
#Macropage and Hybrid-T both have sharper, taller peaks
# Create the track plot with custom colors
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Prim2",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Prim2)
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Ythdf2",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Ythdf2)
AS1211 <- plotBrowserTrack(
  ArchRProj = proj,
  groupBy = "UpdatedClusters",
  geneSymbol = "Eif2ak4",
  upstream = 50000,
  downstream = 50000,
  pal = customColors)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(AS1211$Eif2ak4)
```
#Launching ArchRBrowser
```{r}
#ArchRBrowser(projHybridA)
```


##Peak Calling

```{r}
pathToMacs2 <- "/Users/queitsch/opt/anaconda3/bin/MACS2"
```

```{r}
#BiocManager::install("BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10")
```

```{r}

# Error in .getCoverageMetadata(ArchRProj = ArchRProj, groupBy = groupBy,  : No Coverage Metadata found for : Clusters. Please run addGroupCoverages!

# To address this... I'll try to run addGroupCoverages first
proj <- addGroupCoverages(ArchRProj = proj, groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged")
```

```{r}
proj_motif <- addReproduciblePeakSet(
    ArchRProj = proj, 
    groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged", 
    pathToMacs2 = pathToMacs2
)
```

```{r}
saveArchRProject(ArchRProj = proj_motif, outputDirectory = "Save-ProjMotif", load = TRUE)
#This worked for 250514: Complete
#Prior two steps take a very long time so be sure to save here!!!
```

```{r}
proj_motif <- loadArchRProject(path = "Save-ProjMotif")
```

```{r}
getPeakSet(proj_motif)
```

```{r}
proj_motif5 <- addPeakMatrix(proj_motif)
```

```{r}
getAvailableMatrices(proj_motif5)
```

##Identifying Marker Peaks with ArchR

```{r}
proj_motif5 <- addCellColData(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  data = as.character(proj_motif5$Clusters_TuMerged),
  name = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  cells = proj_motif5$cellNames,
  force = TRUE
)

```

```{r}
saveArchRProject(ArchRProj = proj_motif5, outputDirectory = "Save-ProjMotif", load = TRUE)
```

```{r}
proj_motif5 <- loadArchRProject(path = "Save-ProjMotif")
```

```{r}
markersPeaks <- getMarkerFeatures(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
    useMatrix = "PeakMatrix", 
    groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
    bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
    testMethod = "wilcoxon")
```

```{r}
markersPeaks
```

```{r}
markerList <- getMarkers(markersPeaks, cutOff = "FDR <= 0.01 & Log2FC >= 1")
markerList
```

```{r}
markerList$"Hybrid-M"
```

```{r}
markerListGR <- getMarkers(markersPeaks, cutOff = "FDR <= 0.01 & Log2FC >= 1", returnGR = TRUE)
markerListGR
```

```{r}
heatmapPeaks <- plotMarkerHeatmap(
  seMarker = markersPeaks, 
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5",
  transpose = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
draw(heatmapPeaks, heatmap_legend_side = "bot", annotation_legend_side = "bot")
```

```{r}
plotPDF(heatmapPeaks, name = "Peak-Marker-Heatmap", width = 8, height = 6, ArchRProj = proj_motif5, addDOC = FALSE)
```

```{r}
pma <- plotMarkers(seMarker = markersPeaks, name = "Hybrid-M", cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 1", plotAs = "MA")
pma
```

```{r}
pv <- plotMarkers(seMarker = markersPeaks, name = "Hybrid-M", cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 1", plotAs = "Volcano")
pv
```
#Optional to generate vectorized PDF
```{r}
#plotPDF(pma, pv, name = "C1-Markers-MA-Volcano", width = 5, height = 5, ArchRProj = projHeme5, addDOC = FALSE)
```

```{r}
p <- plotBrowserTrack(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
    groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged", 
    geneSymbol = c("RUNX1"),
    features =  getMarkers(markersPeaks, cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 1", returnGR = TRUE)["Hybrid-M"],
    upstream = 50000,
    downstream = 50000
)
```

```{r}
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(p$RUNX1)
```

```{r}
plotPDF(p, name = "Plot-Tracks-With-Features", width = 5, height = 5, ArchRProj = proj_motif5, addDOC = FALSE)
```

#Pairwise testing between groups
```{r}
markerTest <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)
```
# Plot Markers
```{r}
pma <- plotMarkers(seMarker = markerTest, name = "Hybrid-M", cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & abs(Log2FC) >= 1", plotAs = "MA")
class(pma)

pmv <- plotMarkers(seMarker = markerTest, name = "Hybrid-M", cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & abs(Log2FC) >= 1", plotAs = "Volcano")
class(pmv)

plotPDF(pma, name = "MA-Plot.pdf", ArchRProj = proj_motif5)
plotPDF(pmv, name = "Volcano-Plot.pdf", ArchRProj = proj_motif5)


plotPDF(pma, pmv, name = "Erythroid-vs-Progenitor-Markers-MA-Volcano", width = 5, height = 5, ArchRProj = proj_motif5, addDOC = FALSE)

```
## Motif Enrichment

```{r}
#devtools::install_github("GreenleafLab/chromVARmotifs")
```
# Set Motif Annotations (Crucial)
```{r}
#library(BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10)
proj_motif5 <- addMotifAnnotations(ArchRProj = proj_motif5, motifSet = "cisbp", name = "Motif")
```
# Save Motif Annotations to ArchR Project
```{r}
saveArchRProject(ArchRProj = proj_motif5, outputDirectory = "Save-ProjMotif", load = TRUE)
```
# [TBD]
```{r}
pSet <- getPeakSet(ArchRProj = proj_motif5)
pSet$name <- paste(seqnames(pSet), start(pSet), end(pSet), sep = "_")
```
```{r}
matches <- getMatches(ArchRProj = proj_motif5, name = "Motif")
rownames(matches) <- paste(seqnames(matches), start(matches), end(matches), sep = "_")
matches <- matches[pSet$name]
```
```{r}
motifsUp <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )
```
# Enrichment Heatmap
```{r}
# plotEnrichHeatmap(motifsUp, n = 20, transpose = TRUE)
# pdf("HybirdM_Tumor_Motif_Enrichment_Heatmap.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
# plotEnrichHeatmap(enrichMotifs, n = 20, transpose = TRUE)
# dev.off()
```
# Enrichment +
```{r}
df <- data.frame(TF = rownames(motifsUp), mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp)[,1])
df <- df[order(df$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE),]
df$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df))
```

```{r}
head(df)
```

```{r}
ggUp <- ggplot(df, aes(rank, mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) + 
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        data = df[rev(seq_len(30)), ], aes(x = rank, y = mlog10Padj, label = TF), 
        size = 1.5,
        nudge_x = 2,
        color = "black",
        max.overlaps = 30  # Increase max.overlaps
  ) + theme_ArchR() + 
  ylab("-log10(P-adj) Motif Enrichment") + 
  xlab("Rank Sorted TFs Enriched") +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = paletteContinuous(set = "comet"))

ggUp
#This worked when I typed it into the console and hit enter...
pdf("ggUp_plot.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(ggUp)
dev.off()
```
```{r}
top10 <- df[order(-df$mlog10Padj), ][1:10, ]


dotmotifenrich_HMvM <- ggplot(top10, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Makes it horizontal
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Marcophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvM.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvM)
dev.off()
```
# For Hybrid-M vs. Tumor
```{r}
markerTest_HMvT <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Tumor"
)
motifsUp_HMvT <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HMvT,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )
df_HMvT <- data.frame(TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvT), mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvT)[,1])
df_HMvT <- df_HMvT[order(df_HMvT$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE),]
df_HMvT$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df_HMvT))

top10_HMvT <- df_HMvT[order(-df$mlog10Padj), ][1:10, ]


dotmotifenrich_HMvT <- ggplot(top10_HMvT, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Makes it horizontal
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Tumor)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvT.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvT)
dev.off()
```
# For Hybrid-M vs. Hybrid-T
```{r}
markerTest_HMvHT <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Hybrid-T"
)
motifsUp_HMvHT <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HMvHT,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )
df_HMvHT <- data.frame(TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvHT), mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvHT)[,1])
df_HMvHT <- df_HMvHT[order(df_HMvHT$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE),]
df_HMvHT$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df_HMvHT))

top10_HMvHT <- df_HMvHT[order(-df$mlog10Padj), ][1:10, ]


dotmotifenrich_HMvHT <- ggplot(top10_HMvHT, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Makes it horizontal
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Hybrid-T)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvHT.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvHT)
dev.off()
```
# For Hybrid-T vs. Macrophage
```{r}
markerTest_HTvM <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-T",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)
motifsUp_HTvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HTvM,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )
df_HTvM <- data.frame(TF = rownames(motifsUp_HTvM), mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HTvM)[,1])
df_HTvM <- df_HTvM[order(df_HTvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE),]
df_HTvM$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df_HTvM))

top10_HTvM <- df_HTvM[order(-df$mlog10Padj), ][1:10, ]


dotmotifenrich_HTvM <- ggplot(top10_HTvM, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Makes it horizontal
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-T vs. Macrophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HTvM.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HTvM)
dev.off()
```
# For Hybrid-T vs. Tumor
```{r}
markerTest_HTvT <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-T",
  bgdGroups = "Tumor"
)
motifsUp_HTvT <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HTvT,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )
df_HTvT <- data.frame(TF = rownames(motifsUp_HTvT), mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HTvT)[,1])
df_HTvT <- df_HTvT[order(df_HTvT$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE),]
df_HTvT$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df_HTvT))

top10_HTvT <- df_HTvT[order(-df$mlog10Padj), ][1:10, ]


dotmotifenrich_HTvT <- ggplot(top10_HTvT, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Makes it horizontal
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-T vs. Tumor)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HTvT.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HTvT)
dev.off()
```
# For Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage Updated for Only Enrichment
```{r}
markerTest_HMvM <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)
# Enriched motifs (Log2FC >= 0.5)
motifsUp_HMvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HMvM,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )


# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HMvM <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvM),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvM)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)
# Remove _ and trailing numbers from TF names
df_up_HMvM$TF <- sub("_\\d+$", "", df_up_HMvM$TF)
df_up_HMvM <- df_up_HMvM[order(df_up_HMvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top10_up <- head(df_up_HMvM, 10)

# Combine top 5 enriched and depleted
top_motifs_HMvM_E <- rbind(top10_up)


# Plot
dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs_HMvM_E, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Makes it horizontal
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated)
dev.off()
```
# For Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage Updated for Depletion
```{r}
markerTest_HMvM <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)
# Enriched motifs (Log2FC >= 0.5)
motifsUp_HMvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HMvM,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )
# Depleted motifs (Log2FC <= -0.5)
motifsDown_HMvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HMvM,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC <= -0.5"
)

# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HMvM <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvM),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvM)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)
# Remove _ and trailing numbers from TF names
df_up_HMvM$TF <- sub("_\\d+$", "", df_up_HMvM$TF)
df_up_HMvM <- df_up_HMvM[order(df_up_HMvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top5_up <- head(df_up_HMvM, 5)

# Data frame for depleted motifs
df_down_HMvM <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsDown_HMvM),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsDown_HMvM)[,1],
  Direction = "Depleted"
)
# Remove _ and trailing numbers from TF names
df_down_HMvM$TF <- sub("_\\d+$", "", df_down_HMvM$TF)
df_down_HMvM <- df_down_HMvM[order(df_down_HMvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top5_down <- head(df_down_HMvM, 5)

# Combine top 5 enriched and depleted
top_motifs <- rbind(top5_up, top5_down)


# Plot
dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs, aes(x = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), y = mlog10Padj, color = Direction)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj)) +
  coord_flip() +  # Horizontal plot
  labs(
    x = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    y = "-log10(P-adj)",
    title = "Top 5 Enriched and Depleted Motifs (Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Enriched" = "red", "Depleted" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Updated.pdf", width = 6, height = 4)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Updated)
dev.off()
```

## Plotting Motif Logos 
```{r}
#install.packages("ggseqlogo")
```
```{r}
library(ggseqlogo)
logo_runx1 <- getPeakAnnotation(proj_motif5, "Motif")$motifs[["Runx1_712"]]

PWMatrixToProbMatrix <- function(x){
  if (class(x) != "PWMatrix") stop("x must be a TFBSTools::PWMatrix object")
  m <- (exp(as(x, "matrix"))) * TFBSTools::bg(x)/sum(TFBSTools::bg(x))
  m <- t(t(m)/colSums(m))
  m
}
ppm_runx1 <- PWMatrixToProbMatrix(logo_runx1)
colSums(ppm_runx1) %>% range
logo_plot <- ggseqlogo(ppm_runx1, method = "bits")
ggsave("runx1_logo.png", plot = logo_plot, width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
#install.packages("ggimage")
```
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggimage)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Create MotifMatrix by computing deviations
proj_motif5 <- addDeviationsMatrix(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  matrixName = "MotifMatrix"
)
```

```{r}
exists("getPwm", envir = asNamespace("ArchR"))

print(top_motifs_HMvM_E)
# Check if logo files exist
sapply(top_motifs_HMvM_E$logo_path, file.exists)


```
# Plotting Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage Enriched Motifs w/ Logos
```{r}
# Your existing code to get enriched motifs
markerTest_HMvM <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)

# Enriched motifs (Log2FC >= 0.5)
motifsUp_HMvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest_HMvM,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HMvM <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvM),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvM)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)

# Remove _ and trailing numbers from TF names
df_up_HMvM$TF <- sub("_\\d+$", "", df_up_HMvM$TF)
df_up_HMvM <- df_up_HMvM[order(df_up_HMvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top10_up <- head(df_up_HMvM, 10)

# Combine top 10 enriched motifs
top_motifs_HMvM_E <- top10_up

# Directory to save motif logos
dir.create("motif_logos", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to generate and save motif logos
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  # Get available motifs
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs) || !motif_name %in% motifs) {
    warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix"))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Get motif PWM from annotations
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      stop(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations"))
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]]@profileMatrix
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("PWM not found for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Convert PWM to PFMatrix
  pwm_matrix <- as.matrix(motif_pwm)
  pfm <- PFMatrix(ID = motif_name, name = motif_name, profileMatrix = pwm_matrix)
  
  # Save logo as PNG
  output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, ".png"))
  png(output_file, width = 200, height = 100)
  seqLogo(pfm)
  dev.off()
  
  return(output_file)
}

# Generate logos for top 10 motifs and add image paths to data frame
top_motifs_HMvM_E$logo_path <- sapply(top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF, function(tf) {
  generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos")
})

# Check if any logos failed to generate
top_motifs_HMvM_E <- top_motifs_HMvM_E[!is.null(top_motifs_HMvM_E$logo_path), ]

# Create and save plot
dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs_HMvM_E, 
                                              aes(x = mlog10Padj, y = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  geom_image(aes(y = reorder(TF, mlog10Padj), image = logo_path), size = 0.2, nudge_x = -0.5, by = "height") +
  labs(
    x = "-log10(P-adj)",
    y = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10), # Show motif names
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("250515_dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_WithLogos.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated)
dev.off()
```

# Trouble Shoot Motif Annotations
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggimage)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Re-add motif annotations with cisbp
proj_motif5 <- addMotifAnnotations(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  motifSet = "cisbp",
  name = "Motif",
  force = TRUE # Overwrite existing annotations
)

# Re-generate MotifMatrix
proj_motif5 <- addDeviationsMatrix(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  matrixName = "MotifMatrix",
  force = TRUE # Overwrite existing MotifMatrix
)

motifs <- getFeatures(proj_motif5, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
print(head(motifs))
grep("Runx", motifs, value = TRUE)
```
# Is this the code that actually worked??!?!
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggimage)
library(ggseqlogo)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Ensure MotifMatrix exists
if (!"MotifMatrix" %in% getAvailableMatrices(proj_motif5)) {
  cat("Adding motif annotations and generating MotifMatrix...\n")
  proj_motif5 <- addMotifAnnotations(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    motifSet = "cisbp",
    name = "Motif",
    force = TRUE
  )
  proj_motif5 <- addDeviationsMatrix(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    matrixName = "MotifMatrix",
    force = TRUE
  )
}

# Verify MotifMatrix motifs
cat("Available motifs in MotifMatrix:\n")
motifs <- getFeatures(proj_motif5, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
print(head(motifs))
print(grep("Runx", motifs, value = TRUE))

# Your existing code for marker features and motif enrichment
markerTest_HMvM <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)

motifsUp_HMvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HMvM,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

# Verify enriched motif names
cat("Enriched motifs from peakAnnoEnrichment:\n")
print(head(rownames(motifsUp_HMvM)))

# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HMvM <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvM),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvM)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)

# Sort and select top 10
df_up_HMvM <- df_up_HMvM[order(df_up_HMvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top10_up <- head(df_up_HMvM, 10)
top_motifs_HMvM_E <- top10_up

# Verify motif names
cat("Top enriched motifs:\n")
print(top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF)

# Directory for motif logos
dir.create("motif_logos", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
PWMatrixToProbMatrix <- function(x){
  if (class(x) != "PWMatrix") stop("x must be a TFBSTools::PWMatrix object")
  m <- (exp(as(x, "matrix"))) * TFBSTools::bg(x)/sum(TFBSTools::bg(x))
  m <- t(t(m)/colSums(m))
  m
}

# Function to generate and save motif logos using ggseqlogo
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  cat("Attempting to process motif:", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Get available motifs from MotifMatrix
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs)) {
    warning("No motifs found in MotifMatrix")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check for motif with deviations: or z: prefix
  motif_in_matrix <- motif_name
  if (!motif_name %in% motifs) {
    prefixed_name <- paste0("deviations:", motif_name)
    if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
      cat("Found motif with deviations: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
      motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
    } else {
      prefixed_name <- paste0("z:", motif_name)
      if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
        cat("Found motif with z: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
        motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
      } else {
        warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix. Available motifs:", paste(head(motifs), collapse = ", ")))
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Get motif PWMatrix from annotations (using raw motif name)
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (is.null(motif_annotations)) {
      warning("Motif annotations not found")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations. Available annotations:", paste(head(names(motif_annotations)), collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]] # Get PWMatrix object
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve PWMatrix for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    warning(paste("No PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
  tryCatch({
    ppm <- PWMatrixToProbMatrix(motif_pwm)
    cat("Probability matrix created for", motif_name, "\n")
    
    # Save logo as PNG using ggseqlogo
    output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, "_logo.png"))
    cat("Attempting to save logo to", output_file, "\n")
    
    logo_plot <- ggseqlogo(ppm, method = "bits")
    ggsave(output_file, plot = logo_plot, width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)
    
    if (file.exists(output_file)) {
      cat("Logo successfully created for", motif_name, "at", output_file, "\n")
      return(output_file)
    } else {
      warning("Failed to create logo file for", motif_name)
      return(NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to save logo for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Generate logos using original motif names
top_motifs_HMvM_E$logo_path <- sapply(top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF, function(tf) {
  generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos")
})

# Trim motif names for display *after* logo generation
top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF_display <- sub("_\\d+$", "", top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF)

# Check logo paths and existence
print("Logo paths:")
print(top_motifs_HMvM_E$logo_path)
print("Files exist:")
logo_exists <- sapply(top_motifs_HMvM_E$logo_path, function(x) is.character(x) && nzchar(x) && file.exists(x))
print(logo_exists)
cat("Generated logo files:\n")
print(list.files("motif_logos", pattern = "*.png", full.names = TRUE))

# Create and save plot
dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs_HMvM_E, 
                                              aes(x = mlog10Padj, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  { if (any(logo_exists)) 
      geom_image(aes(x = 1.5, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj), image = logo_path), 
                 size = 0.1, nudge_y = 0.2, by = "height") } +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, max(top_motifs_HMvM_E$mlog10Padj) * 1.1)) +
  labs(
    x = "-log10(P-adj)",
    y = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Macrophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_WithLogos.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvM_Enriched_Updated)
dev.off()
```
# Plotting Hybrid-M vs. Tumor Enriched Motifs w/ Logos
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggimage)
library(ggseqlogo)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Ensure MotifMatrix exists
if (!"MotifMatrix" %in% getAvailableMatrices(proj_motif5)) {
  cat("Adding motif annotations and generating MotifMatrix...\n")
  proj_motif5 <- addMotifAnnotations(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    motifSet = "cisbp",
    name = "Motif",
    force = TRUE
  )
  proj_motif5 <- addDeviationsMatrix(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    matrixName = "MotifMatrix",
    force = TRUE
  )
}

# Verify MotifMatrix motifs
cat("Available motifs in MotifMatrix:\n")
motifs <- getFeatures(proj_motif5, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
print(head(motifs))
print(grep("Runx", motifs, value = TRUE))

# Your existing code for marker features and motif enrichment
markerTest_HMvT <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M",
  bgdGroups = "Tumor"
)

motifsUp_HMvT <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HMvT,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

# Verify enriched motif names
cat("Enriched motifs from peakAnnoEnrichment:\n")
print(head(rownames(motifsUp_HMvT)))

# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HMvT <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HMvT),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HMvT)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)

# Sort and select top 10
df_up_HMvT <- df_up_HMvT[order(df_up_HMvT$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top10_up_HMvT <- head(df_up_HMvT, 10)
top_motifs_HMvT_E <- top10_up_HMvT

# Verify motif names
cat("Top enriched motifs:\n")
print(top_motifs_HMvT_E$TF)

# Directory for motif logos
dir.create("motif_logos", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
PWMatrixToProbMatrix <- function(x){
  if (class(x) != "PWMatrix") stop("x must be a TFBSTools::PWMatrix object")
  m <- (exp(as(x, "matrix"))) * TFBSTools::bg(x)/sum(TFBSTools::bg(x))
  m <- t(t(m)/colSums(m))
  m
}

# Function to generate and save motif logos using ggseqlogo
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  cat("Attempting to process motif:", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Get available motifs from MotifMatrix
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs)) {
    warning("No motifs found in MotifMatrix")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check for motif with deviations: or z: prefix
  motif_in_matrix <- motif_name
  if (!motif_name %in% motifs) {
    prefixed_name <- paste0("deviations:", motif_name)
    if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
      cat("Found motif with deviations: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
      motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
    } else {
      prefixed_name <- paste0("z:", motif_name)
      if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
        cat("Found motif with z: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
        motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
      } else {
        warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix. Available motifs:", paste(head(motifs), collapse = ", ")))
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Get motif PWMatrix from annotations (using raw motif name)
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (is.null(motif_annotations)) {
      warning("Motif annotations not found")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations. Available annotations:", paste(head(names(motif_annotations)), collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]] # Get PWMatrix object
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve PWMatrix for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    warning(paste("No PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
  tryCatch({
    ppm <- PWMatrixToProbMatrix(motif_pwm)
    cat("Probability matrix created for", motif_name, "\n")
    
    # Save logo as PNG using ggseqlogo
    output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, "_logo.png"))
    cat("Attempting to save logo to", output_file, "\n")
    
    logo_plot <- ggseqlogo(ppm, method = "bits")
    ggsave(output_file, plot = logo_plot, width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)
    
    if (file.exists(output_file)) {
      cat("Logo successfully created for", motif_name, "at", output_file, "\n")
      return(output_file)
    } else {
      warning("Failed to create logo file for", motif_name)
      return(NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to save logo for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Generate logos using original motif names
top_motifs_HMvT_E$logo_path <- sapply(top_motifs_HMvT_E$TF, function(tf) {
  generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos")
})

# Trim motif names for display *after* logo generation
top_motifs_HMvT_E$TF_display <- sub("_\\d+$", "", top_motifs_HMvT_E$TF)

# Check logo paths and existence
print("Logo paths:")
print(top_motifs_HMvT_E$logo_path)
print("Files exist:")
logo_exists <- sapply(top_motifs_HMvT_E$logo_path, function(x) is.character(x) && nzchar(x) && file.exists(x))
print(logo_exists)
cat("Generated logo files:\n")
print(list.files("motif_logos", pattern = "*.png", full.names = TRUE))

# Create and save plot
dotmotifenrich_HMvT_Enriched_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs_HMvT_E, 
                                              aes(x = mlog10Padj, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  { if (any(logo_exists)) 
      geom_image(aes(x = 100, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj), image = logo_path), 
                 size = 0.1, nudge_y = 0.2, by = "height") } +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, max(top_motifs_HMvT_E$mlog10Padj) * 1.1)) +
  labs(
    x = "-log10(P-adj)",
    y = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-M vs. Tumor)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HMvT_Enriched_WithLogos.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(dotmotifenrich_HMvT_Enriched_Updated)
dev.off()
```
# Plotting Hybrid-T vs. Tumor Enriched Motifs w/ Logos
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggimage)
library(ggseqlogo)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Ensure MotifMatrix exists
if (!"MotifMatrix" %in% getAvailableMatrices(proj_motif5)) {
  cat("Adding motif annotations and generating MotifMatrix...\n")
  proj_motif5 <- addMotifAnnotations(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    motifSet = "cisbp",
    name = "Motif",
    force = TRUE
  )
  proj_motif5 <- addDeviationsMatrix(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    matrixName = "MotifMatrix",
    force = TRUE
  )
}

# Verify MotifMatrix motifs
cat("Available motifs in MotifMatrix:\n")
motifs <- getFeatures(proj_motif5, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
print(head(motifs))
print(grep("Runx", motifs, value = TRUE))

# Your existing code for marker features and motif enrichment
markerTest_HTvT <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-T",
  bgdGroups = "Tumor"
)

motifsUp_HTvT <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HTvT,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

# Verify enriched motif names
cat("Enriched motifs from peakAnnoEnrichment:\n")
print(head(rownames(motifsUp_HTvT)))

# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HTvT <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HTvT),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HTvT)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)

# Sort and select top 10
df_up_HTvT <- df_up_HTvT[order(df_up_HTvT$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top10_up_HTvT <- head(df_up_HTvT, 10)
top_motifs_HTvT_E <- top10_up_HTvT

# Verify motif names
cat("Top enriched motifs:\n")
print(top_motifs_HTvT_E$TF)

# Directory for motif logos
dir.create("motif_logos", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
PWMatrixToProbMatrix <- function(x){
  if (class(x) != "PWMatrix") stop("x must be a TFBSTools::PWMatrix object")
  m <- (exp(as(x, "matrix"))) * TFBSTools::bg(x)/sum(TFBSTools::bg(x))
  m <- t(t(m)/colSums(m))
  m
}

# Function to generate and save motif logos using ggseqlogo
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  cat("Attempting to process motif:", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Get available motifs from MotifMatrix
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs)) {
    warning("No motifs found in MotifMatrix")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check for motif with deviations: or z: prefix
  motif_in_matrix <- motif_name
  if (!motif_name %in% motifs) {
    prefixed_name <- paste0("deviations:", motif_name)
    if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
      cat("Found motif with deviations: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
      motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
    } else {
      prefixed_name <- paste0("z:", motif_name)
      if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
        cat("Found motif with z: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
        motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
      } else {
        warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix. Available motifs:", paste(head(motifs), collapse = ", ")))
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Get motif PWMatrix from annotations (using raw motif name)
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (is.null(motif_annotations)) {
      warning("Motif annotations not found")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations. Available annotations:", paste(head(names(motif_annotations)), collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]] # Get PWMatrix object
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve PWMatrix for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    warning(paste("No PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
  tryCatch({
    ppm <- PWMatrixToProbMatrix(motif_pwm)
    cat("Probability matrix created for", motif_name, "\n")
    
    # Save logo as PNG using ggseqlogo
    output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, "_logo.png"))
    cat("Attempting to save logo to", output_file, "\n")
    
    logo_plot <- ggseqlogo(ppm, method = "bits")
    ggsave(output_file, plot = logo_plot, width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)
    
    if (file.exists(output_file)) {
      cat("Logo successfully created for", motif_name, "at", output_file, "\n")
      return(output_file)
    } else {
      warning("Failed to create logo file for", motif_name)
      return(NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to save logo for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Generate logos using original motif names
top_motifs_HTvT_E$logo_path <- sapply(top_motifs_HTvT_E$TF, function(tf) {
  generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos")
})

# Trim motif names for display *after* logo generation
top_motifs_HTvT_E$TF_display <- sub("_\\d+$", "", top_motifs_HTvT_E$TF)

# Check logo paths and existence
print("Logo paths:")
print(top_motifs_HTvT_E$logo_path)
print("Files exist:")
logo_exists <- sapply(top_motifs_HTvT_E$logo_path, function(x) is.character(x) && nzchar(x) && file.exists(x))
print(logo_exists)
cat("Generated logo files:\n")
print(list.files("motif_logos", pattern = "*.png", full.names = TRUE))

# Create and save plot
dotmotifenrich_HTvT_Enriched_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs_HTvT_E, 
                                              aes(x = mlog10Padj, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  { if (any(logo_exists)) 
      geom_image(aes(x = 25, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj), image = logo_path), 
                 size = 0.1, nudge_y = 0.2, by = "height") } +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, max(top_motifs_HTvT_E$mlog10Padj) * 1.1)) +
  labs(
    x = "-log10(P-adj)",
    y = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-T vs. Tumor)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HTvT_Enriched_WithLogos.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(dotmotifenrich_HTvT_Enriched_Updated)
dev.off()
```
# Plotting Hybrid-T vs. Macrophage Enriched Motifs w/ Logos
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggimage)
library(ggseqlogo)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Ensure MotifMatrix exists
if (!"MotifMatrix" %in% getAvailableMatrices(proj_motif5)) {
  cat("Adding motif annotations and generating MotifMatrix...\n")
  proj_motif5 <- addMotifAnnotations(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    motifSet = "cisbp",
    name = "Motif",
    force = TRUE
  )
  proj_motif5 <- addDeviationsMatrix(
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    matrixName = "MotifMatrix",
    force = TRUE
  )
}

# Verify MotifMatrix motifs
cat("Available motifs in MotifMatrix:\n")
motifs <- getFeatures(proj_motif5, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
print(head(motifs))
print(grep("Runx", motifs, value = TRUE))

# Your existing code for marker features and motif enrichment
markerTest_HTvM <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-T",
  bgdGroups = "Macrophage"
)

motifsUp_HTvM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HTvM,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

# Verify enriched motif names
cat("Enriched motifs from peakAnnoEnrichment:\n")
print(head(rownames(motifsUp_HTvM)))

# Data frame for enriched motifs
df_up_HTvM <- data.frame(
  TF = rownames(motifsUp_HTvM),
  mlog10Padj = assay(motifsUp_HTvM)[,1],
  Direction = "Enriched"
)

# Sort and select top 10
df_up_HTvM <- df_up_HTvM[order(df_up_HTvM$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
top10_up_HTvM <- head(df_up_HTvM, 10)
top_motifs_HTvM_E <- top10_up_HTvM

# Verify motif names
cat("Top enriched motifs:\n")
print(top_motifs_HTvM_E$TF)

# Directory for motif logos
dir.create("motif_logos", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
PWMatrixToProbMatrix <- function(x){
  if (class(x) != "PWMatrix") stop("x must be a TFBSTools::PWMatrix object")
  m <- (exp(as(x, "matrix"))) * TFBSTools::bg(x)/sum(TFBSTools::bg(x))
  m <- t(t(m)/colSums(m))
  m
}

# Function to generate and save motif logos using ggseqlogo
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  cat("Attempting to process motif:", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Get available motifs from MotifMatrix
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs)) {
    warning("No motifs found in MotifMatrix")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check for motif with deviations: or z: prefix
  motif_in_matrix <- motif_name
  if (!motif_name %in% motifs) {
    prefixed_name <- paste0("deviations:", motif_name)
    if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
      cat("Found motif with deviations: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
      motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
    } else {
      prefixed_name <- paste0("z:", motif_name)
      if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
        cat("Found motif with z: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
        motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
      } else {
        warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix. Available motifs:", paste(head(motifs), collapse = ", ")))
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Get motif PWMatrix from annotations (using raw motif name)
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (is.null(motif_annotations)) {
      warning("Motif annotations not found")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations. Available annotations:", paste(head(names(motif_annotations)), collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]] # Get PWMatrix object
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve PWMatrix for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    warning(paste("No PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
  tryCatch({
    ppm <- PWMatrixToProbMatrix(motif_pwm)
    cat("Probability matrix created for", motif_name, "\n")
    
    # Save logo as PNG using ggseqlogo
    output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, "_logo.png"))
    cat("Attempting to save logo to", output_file, "\n")
    
    logo_plot <- ggseqlogo(ppm, method = "bits")
    ggsave(output_file, plot = logo_plot, width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)
    
    if (file.exists(output_file)) {
      cat("Logo successfully created for", motif_name, "at", output_file, "\n")
      return(output_file)
    } else {
      warning("Failed to create logo file for", motif_name)
      return(NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to save logo for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Generate logos using original motif names
top_motifs_HTvM_E$logo_path <- sapply(top_motifs_HTvM_E$TF, function(tf) {
  generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos")
})

# Trim motif names for display *after* logo generation
top_motifs_HTvM_E$TF_display <- sub("_\\d+$", "", top_motifs_HTvM_E$TF)

# Check logo paths and existence
print("Logo paths:")
print(top_motifs_HTvM_E$logo_path)
print("Files exist:")
logo_exists <- sapply(top_motifs_HTvM_E$logo_path, function(x) is.character(x) && nzchar(x) && file.exists(x))
print(logo_exists)
cat("Generated logo files:\n")
print(list.files("motif_logos", pattern = "*.png", full.names = TRUE))

# Create and save plot
dotmotifenrich_HTvM_Enriched_Updated <- ggplot(top_motifs_HTvM_E, 
                                              aes(x = mlog10Padj, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
  { if (any(logo_exists)) 
      geom_image(aes(x = 25, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj), image = logo_path), 
                 size = 0.1, nudge_y = 0.2, by = "height") } +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, max(top_motifs_HTvM_E$mlog10Padj) * 1.1)) +
  labs(
    x = "-log10(P-adj)",
    y = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
    title = "Top Enriched Motifs (Differential Hybrid-T vs. Macrophage)"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Save plot
pdf("dotmotifenrich_HTvM_Enriched_WithLogos.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
print(dotmotifenrich_HTvM_Enriched_Updated)
dev.off()
```

# 250521: Combined plots for Hybrids-M/T vs. All
```{r}
# Hybrid-M vs all
markerTest_HM_vsAll <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-M"
)

# Hybrid-T vs all
markerTest_HT_vsAll <- getMarkerFeatures(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  useMatrix = "PeakMatrix",
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged",
  testMethod = "wilcoxon",
  bias = c("TSSEnrichment", "log10(nFrags)"),
  useGroups = "Hybrid-T"
)

# Save Annotated Enrichments
motifsUp_HM <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HM_vsAll,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

motifsUp_HT <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
  seMarker = markerTest_HT_vsAll,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
  peakAnnotation = "Motif",
  cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
)

# Prepare data frames of top 10 motifs for each
getTopMotifsDF <- function(motif_enrichment, label) {
  df <- data.frame(
    TF = rownames(motif_enrichment),
    mlog10Padj = assay(motif_enrichment)[,1],
    Direction = label
  )
  df <- df[order(df$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  head(df, 10)
}

top_HM <- getTopMotifsDF(motifsUp_HM, "Hybrid-M")
top_HT <- getTopMotifsDF(motifsUp_HT, "Hybrid-T")

# Function to generate and save motif logos using ggseqlogo
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  cat("Attempting to process motif:", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Get available motifs from MotifMatrix
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs)) {
    warning("No motifs found in MotifMatrix")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check for motif with deviations: or z: prefix
  motif_in_matrix <- motif_name
  if (!motif_name %in% motifs) {
    prefixed_name <- paste0("deviations:", motif_name)
    if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
      cat("Found motif with deviations: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
      motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
    } else {
      prefixed_name <- paste0("z:", motif_name)
      if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
        cat("Found motif with z: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
        motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
      } else {
        warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix. Available motifs:", paste(head(motifs), collapse = ", ")))
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Get motif PWMatrix from annotations (using raw motif name)
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (is.null(motif_annotations)) {
      warning("Motif annotations not found")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations. Available annotations:", paste(head(names(motif_annotations)), collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]] # Get PWMatrix object
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve PWMatrix for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    warning(paste("No PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("PWMatrix retrieved for", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Convert PWMatrix to probability matrix
  tryCatch({
    ppm <- PWMatrixToProbMatrix(motif_pwm)
    cat("Probability matrix created for", motif_name, "\n")
    
    # Save logo as PNG using ggseqlogo
    output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, "_logo.png"))
    cat("Attempting to save logo to", output_file, "\n")
    
    logo_plot <- ggseqlogo(ppm, method = "bits")
    ggsave(output_file, plot = logo_plot, width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)
    
    if (file.exists(output_file)) {
      cat("Logo successfully created for", motif_name, "at", output_file, "\n")
      return(output_file)
    } else {
      warning("Failed to create logo file for", motif_name)
      return(NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to save logo for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}


#Apply existing Motif Logo function
top_HM$logo_path <- sapply(top_HM$TF, function(tf) generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos"))
top_HT$logo_path <- sapply(top_HT$TF, function(tf) generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos"))

top_HM$TF_display <- sub("_\\d+$", "", top_HM$TF)
top_HT$TF_display <- sub("_\\d+$", "", top_HT$TF)

#Plot it
plotMotifEnrichment <- function(df, title, filename) {
  logo_exists <- sapply(df$logo_path, function(x) is.character(x) && nzchar(x) && file.exists(x))
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = mlog10Padj, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj))) +
    geom_point(aes(size = mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) +
    { if (any(logo_exists)) 
        geom_image(aes(x = 1.5, y = reorder(TF_display, mlog10Padj), image = logo_path), 
                   size = 0.1, nudge_y = 0.2, by = "height") } +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, max(df$mlog10Padj) * 1.1)) +
    labs(
      x = "-log10(P-adj)",
      y = "Transcription Factor (Motif)",
      title = title
    ) +
    scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("blue", "purple", "red")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12)
    )
  
  pdf(filename, width = 8, height = 6)
  print(p)
  dev.off()
}
#Generate Plots
plotMotifEnrichment(top_HM, "Top Enriched Motifs: Hybrid-M vs All", "HybridM_vs_All_MotifEnrichment.pdf")
plotMotifEnrichment(top_HT, "Top Enriched Motifs: Hybrid-T vs All", "HybridT_vs_All_MotifEnrichment.pdf")


```




# Generating Only Logos
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(ArchR)
library(TFBSTools)
library(grid)
library(dplyr)

# Directory for motif logos
dir.create("motif_logos", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Function to generate and save motif logos
generateMotifLogo <- function(motif_name, archr_project, output_dir) {
  cat("Attempting to process motif:", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Get available motifs from MotifMatrix
  motifs <- tryCatch({
    getFeatures(archr_project, useMatrix = "MotifMatrix")
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve MotifMatrix features:", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motifs)) {
    warning("No motifs found in MotifMatrix")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check for motif with deviations: or z: prefix
  motif_in_matrix <- motif_name
  if (!motif_name %in% motifs) {
    prefixed_name <- paste0("deviations:", motif_name)
    if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
      cat("Found motif with deviations: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
      motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
    } else {
      prefixed_name <- paste0("z:", motif_name)
      if (prefixed_name %in% motifs) {
        cat("Found motif with z: prefix:", prefixed_name, "\n")
        motif_in_matrix <- prefixed_name
      } else {
        warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in MotifMatrix. Available motifs:", paste(head(motifs), collapse = ", ")))
        return(NULL)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Get motif PWM from annotations (using raw motif name)
  motif_pwm <- tryCatch({
    motif_annotations <- getPeakAnnotation(archr_project, "Motif")$motifs
    if (is.null(motif_annotations)) {
      warning("Motif annotations not found")
      return(NULL)
    }
    if (!motif_name %in% names(motif_annotations)) {
      warning(paste("Motif", motif_name, "not found in annotations. Available annotations:", paste(head(names(motif_annotations)), collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
    pwm <- motif_annotations[[motif_name]]@profileMatrix
    pwm
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to retrieve PWM for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(motif_pwm)) {
    warning(paste("No PWM retrieved for", motif_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("PWM retrieved for", motif_name, "\n")
  
  # Ensure PWM is a matrix
  pwm_matrix <- as.matrix(motif_pwm)
  
  # Save logo as PNG
  output_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(motif_name, "_logo.png"))
  cat("Attempting to save logo to", output_file, "\n")
  
  tryCatch({
    png(output_file, width = 400, height = 200)
    TFBSTools::seqLogo(pwm_matrix) # Explicitly use TFBSTools::seqLogo with raw matrix
    dev.off()
    
    if (file.exists(output_file)) {
      cat("Logo successfully created for", motif_name, "at", output_file, "\n")
      return(output_file)
    } else {
      warning("Failed to create logo file for", motif_name)
      return(NULL)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning(paste("Failed to save logo for", motif_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Generate logos for top 10 enriched motifs
cat("Generating logos for top 10 enriched motifs...\n")
logo_paths <- sapply(top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF, function(tf) {
  generateMotifLogo(tf, proj_motif5, "motif_logos")
})

# Create a data frame to summarize results
logo_results <- data.frame(
  TF = top_motifs_HMvM_E$TF,
  Logo_Path = unlist(logo_paths),
  Logo_Created = sapply(logo_paths, function(x) is.character(x) && nzchar(x) && file.exists(x))
)

# Print results
print("Logo generation results:")
print(logo_results)

# List all generated PNG files
cat("Generated logo files:\n")
print(list.files("motif_logos", pattern = "*.png", full.names = TRUE))
```

```{r}
motifsDo <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markerTest,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC <= -0.5"
  )

motifsDo
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(TF = rownames(motifsDo), mlog10Padj = assay(motifsDo)[,1])
df <- df[order(df$mlog10Padj, decreasing = TRUE),]
df$rank <- seq_len(nrow(df))

ggDo <- ggplot(df, aes(rank, mlog10Padj, color = mlog10Padj)) + 
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        data = df[rev(seq_len(30)), ], aes(x = rank, y = mlog10Padj, label = TF), 
        size = 1.5,
        nudge_x = 2,
        color = "black",
        max.overlaps = 30  # Increase max.overlaps
  ) + theme_ArchR() + 
  ylab("-log10(FDR) Motif Enrichment") +
  xlab("Rank Sorted TFs Enriched") +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = paletteContinuous(set = "comet"))

ggDo
```

```{r}
plotPDF(ggUp, ggDo, name = "C1-vs-C2-Markers-Motifs-Enriched", width = 10, height = 10, ArchRProj = proj_motif5, addDOC = FALSE)
#no such index at level 2
```

#Motif Enrichment in Marker Peaks

```{r}
enrichMotifs <- peakAnnoEnrichment(
    seMarker = markersPeaks,
    ArchRProj = proj_motif5,
    peakAnnotation = "Motif",
    cutOff = "FDR <= 0.1 & Log2FC >= 0.5"
  )

heatmapEM <- plotEnrichHeatmap(enrichMotifs, n = 10, transpose = TRUE)
#N determiens the number of motifs

ComplexHeatmap::draw(heatmapEM, heatmap_legend_side = "bot", annotation_legend_side = "bot")

plotPDF(heatmapEM, name = "Motifs-Enriched-Marker-Heatmap", width = 8, height = 6, ArchRProj = proj_motif5, addDOC = FALSE)
```


#Motif Footprinting
```{r}
motifPositions <- getPositions(proj_motif5)
```
```{r}
motifPositions
```
```{r}
motifs <- c("RUNX1")
markerMotifs <- unlist(lapply(motifs, function(x) grep(x, names(motifPositions), value = TRUE)))
markerMotifs <- markerMotifs[markerMotifs %ni% "SREBF1_22"]
markerMotifs
```
```{r}
proj_motif5 <- addGroupCoverages(ArchRProj = proj_motif5, groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged")
```
```{r}
seFoot <- getFootprints(
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  positions = motifPositions[markerMotifs], 
  groupBy = "Clusters_TuMerged"
)
```
#Subtract Tn5 Bias
```{r}
plotFootprints(
  seFoot = seFoot,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  normMethod = "Subtract",
  plotName = "Footprints-Subtract-Bias",
  addDOC = FALSE,
  smoothWindow = 5
)
```
#Divide by Tn5 Bias
```{r}
plotFootprints(
  seFoot = seFoot,
  ArchRProj = proj_motif5, 
  normMethod = "Divide",
  plotName = "Footprints-Divide-Bias",
  addDOC = FALSE,
  smoothWindow = 5
)
```
